# QuickQuill

## Private, on-device meeting notes for Mac

8 followers

## Private, on-device meeting notes for Mac

8 followers

Visit website

AI notetakers

•

Transcription

QuickQuill records your meetings and turns them into transcripts and summaries, and nothing is ever sent to the cloud. No bot joins the call, and it keeps working with Wi-Fi off, which is how the demo video was recorded. It also shows live subtitles with translation while you record, and there's push-to-talk dictation for any app. No account, no subscription. Dictation is free forever, and a single $49 purchase unlocks the full meeting workflow. Requires macOS 26 on Apple Silicon.

 Overview
 Reviews
 Alternatives
 Built with
 Team
 More

Free Options [...] It requires macOS 26 on Apple Silicon. Dictation is free with no time limit. The meeting features are $49 once during launch, and $79 after that. I didn't want this to be another subscription, so there isn't one. Give it a try at quickquill.app🪶 [...] Hi Product Hunt, I'm a solo developer in Japan👋 I built QuickQuill because I never got comfortable with meeting notetakers. You invite some company's bot into the call, it sits there in the participant list, everyone acts like that's normal, and the recording ends up on a server you never see. The apps say they won't look at it, and maybe they don't. I just didn't want work conversations to depend on that kind of trust. QuickQuill does everything on your Mac. It records both sides of the meeting, transcribes it, shows live subtitles with translation if you need them, and writes a summary when you stop. Nothing appears in the participant list because nothing joins the call. I recorded the demo on my M1 Mac with Wi-Fi turned off.  It requires macOS 26 on Apple Silicon. Dictation is free

# QuickQuill

## Text expansion tool that helps you write faster

QuickQuill QuickQuill

QuickQuill is a text expander designed to help you save time by turning short abbreviations into longer, predefined phrases. Ideal for anyone who frequently types the same responses whether in emails, reports, or support tickets QuickQuill lets you create shortcuts for commonly used text, reducing repetitive typing. The tool is straightforward to use and integrates seamlessly into your workflow.

results.title: The 6 best Quillbot alternatives for writers in 2026 | eesel AI
results.content:
Cons: This is a professional content creation platform. If you just need to rephrase a paragraph for a school assignment, this is probably more than you need. Its power is in generating full-length articles, not quick sentence edits.

Pricing:

 Free to try: You can generate your first blog entirely for free to see the quality for yourself.
 Paid: It’s a credit-based system, starting at "$99 for 50 blog credits". You can buy more as needed.

### 2. Grammarly

A screenshot of the Grammarly landing page, a well-known option among Quillbot alternatives.

A screenshot of the Grammarly landing page, a well-known option among Quillbot alternatives. [...] If you're serious about growing your online presence, it's time to think bigger than paraphrasing. Instead of just tweaking sentences, why not generate complete, high-ranking articles automatically? Generate your first blog for free with the eesel AI blog writer and see the difference for yourself.

## Frequently Asked Questions

What are the best free Quillbot alternatives available in 2026?

For free use, Grammarly is excellent for grammar and clarity checks. Wordtune also offers a free plan with a daily limit on rewrites, making it one of the better free Quillbot alternatives for quick sentence adjustments.

Are there any Quillbot alternatives that can generate entire blog posts? [...] Pricing:

 Free: 200 language suggestions per month and 5 uses per day of its writing features.
 Prime: Starts at "$11.5/month" (billed annually) for unlimited access.

### 6. Wordtune

A screenshot of the Wordtune landing page, a direct competitor to Quillbot's core rephrasing feature and one of the top Quillbot alternatives.

A screenshot of the Wordtune landing page, a direct competitor to Quillbot's core rephrasing feature and one of the top Quillbot alternatives.

If you want a direct, no-fuss alternative to Quillbot's main feature, Wordtune is your best bet. It excels at rewriting and rephrasing text one sentence at a time. Just highlight a sentence, and Wordtune offers several different ways to phrase it.

results.title: Best Quill Alternatives & Competitors
results.content: MagicQuill   MagicQuill is an intelligent and interactive system that achieves precise image editing. As a highly practical application, image editing encounters a variety of user demands and thus prioritizes excellent ease of use. In this paper, we unveil MagicQuill, an integrated image editing system designed to help users swiftly actualize their creativity. Our system starts with a streamlined yet functionally robust interface, enabling users to articulate their ideas (e.g., inserting elements, erasing objects, altering color, etc.) with just a few strokes. These interactions are then monitored by a multimodal large language model (MLLM) to anticipate user intentions in real-time, bypassing the need for prompt entry. Finally, we apply the powerful diffusion prior, enhanced by a [...] ArchiQuill   ArchiQuill is an AI-powered architectural rendering platform that transforms sketches, elevations, and design concepts into photorealistic images within seconds. It supports popular design tools like SketchUp, Rhino, Revit, Cinema 4D, 3ds Max, and more, allowing architects to turn their digital or hand-drawn ideas into polished visuals instantly. With specialized tools for exterior design, interior spaces, landscape projects, and garden layouts, ArchiQuill streamlines the entire visualization process. Designers can explore fast concept development, real-time AO map rendering, and intelligent design recommendations powered by AI. The platform also encourages creativity by offering style customization and rapid prototyping capabilities. Built for speed, simplicity, and [...] StudyX   TeachQuill is a comprehensive AI-powered productivity platform designed specifically for educators to eliminate administrative burnout. It offers an integrated suite of over 40+ specialized AI tools that automate the most time-consuming aspects of teaching. Core functionalities include an AI Weekly Lesson Planner, an intelligent Rubric Generator, and a streamlined IEP Goal Creator. For assessment, TeachQuill provides automated Essay Grading and Report Card Comment Generators that maintain a personalized touch while saving hours of manual work. Beyond planning, the platform features a variety of classroom engagement tools, such as Review Game Generators (Jeopardy style) and AI Worksheet Makers for Math and Literacy.
